title: About Cardiff: Small Business Loan & Financing Solutions
h1: A trusted leader in small business lending
metaDescription: Cardiff provides fast business loans and flexible merchant financing for your expansion needs. Explore your business credit options.

blocks.text: Cardiff, a small business lender based in San Diego, offers fast, flexible financing solutions tailored to the needs of small businesses throughout the US. Since 2004, the company has funded over $12 billion, providing approval in minutes and same day funding in most cases.

Backed by the latest technology and integrations with partners like Plaid®, Cardiff blends real-time financial analysis with personalized service, to deliver a reliable, transparent experience for business owners across industries like construction, restaurants, trucking, and more.
Real numbers. Real impact. Here’s why thousands of businesses choose Cardiff.
More than two decades supporting Main Street
Over $12 Billion funded to thousands of small businesses
Approvals in Minutes, Funding Same Day
Over 90% of applicants are approved for small business financing
Meet the team guiding our mission to make business funding simple and transparent.
